title: Browse the full portfolio homepage
description: This verifies that a visitor can load the public portfolio and see all core sections of the homepage content.

steps.description: Verify the hero, about, skills, projects, experience, certifications, and contact content are displayed

title: Sign in to the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can sign in with email and password and reach the private dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Submit a valid contact message
description: This verifies that a visitor can send a valid message from the contact form and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with Alex Rivera
Fill in the email field with alex.rivera@example.com
Fill in the message field with a valid inquiry about the portfolio
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Open a project from the portfolio and return home
description: This verifies that a visitor can open a project from the homepage, review its detail page, and navigate back to the public portfolio.

steps.description: Open a project from the projects section
Verify the project detail page displays the project description, tech stack, metrics, and related projects
Verify the public portfolio homepage is displayed

title: Navigate between admin content managers
description: This verifies that an authenticated admin can move between the dashboard and the main content management sections.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the selected admin management pages are accessible

title: View project details from a direct project URL
description: This verifies that a visitor can access a project detail page directly and see the full project information.

steps.description: Verify the project detail page displays the project description, tech stack, metrics, and related projects

title: Edit and save hero content
description: This verifies that an authenticated admin can update the hero section, save changes, and see the updated content on the public site after refresh.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Update the hero content with a new test value
Verify the updated hero content is displayed on the public homepage

title: Edit and save about content
description: This verifies that an authenticated admin can update the about section, save changes, and see the updated content on the public site after refresh.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Update the about content with a new test value
Verify the updated about content is displayed on the public homepage

title: View incoming contact messages in the admin area
description: This verifies that an authenticated admin can open the messages viewer and see submitted public contact messages.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify incoming contact messages are displayed

title: Show validation errors for an incomplete contact form
description: This verifies that the contact form blocks submission and shows inline validation feedback when required fields are missing or invalid.

steps.description: Submit the contact form without entering required details
Verify inline validation errors are visible

title: Access is blocked for protected admin routes without signing in
description: This verifies that a public visitor cannot open protected admin pages without an authenticated session.

steps.description: Verify the admin login page is displayed
Verify the admin login page is displayed

title: Show validation errors for malformed contact input
description: This verifies that the contact form rejects malformed visitor input and keeps the user on the form with validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with A
Fill in the email field with invalid-email
Fill in the message field with Hi
Verify inline validation errors are visible

title: Reject invalid admin credentials
description: This verifies that the admin login form shows an error when the entered credentials are not valid.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Verify a login error message is visible
